name: Shrimp & Scallops in Wine Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 to 6 cups Milk - depending upon desired consistency
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the shrimp and scallops until done; set aside.
2. Slowly melt butter in a saucepan.
3. Add cornstarch, then milk, stirring constantly.
4. Gradually add white wine to the mixture.
5. Combine everything over cooked white rice.
6. Yield: 12 servings.
